get.description: Returns API information, version, available endpoints, and system status. This endpoint does not require authentication.

post.description: Find the nearest Indian postal code(s) to given GPS coordinates. Returns pincodes sorted by distance from the point, useful when the point might be outside any pincode boundary or for finding nearby delivery options.

delhi-center.description: Search for up to 3 nearest pincodes within 5km of Connaught Place, Delhi

mumbai-gateway.summary: Find pincodes near Gateway of India
mumbai-gateway.description: Search for nearest pincode within 10km of Gateway of India, Mumbai

404.description: No pincode found within search radius

post.description: Find the pincode whose boundary polygon contains the given GPS coordinates. Uses exact point-in-polygon matching. Returns the pincode you are currently located in. Perfect for "Where am I?" queries.

delhi-parliament.summary: Locate pincode at Parliament House, Delhi

200.description: Successfully located pincode or confirmed no pincode contains the point

get.description: Retrieve complete information for a specific 6-digit Indian postal code including location, administrative boundaries, and post office details.

parameters.description: Include associated post offices in the response

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search in office name or pincode

parameters.name: includePostOffices
parameters.description: Include post offices in the response

post.description: Calculate distance between any two locations (PINCODE, DIGIPIN, or coordinates) with delivery time estimates.

info.title: PinPoint India API
info.description: India's most comprehensive dual-system addressing API supporting both traditional PINCODE (6-digit postal codes) and modern DIGIPIN (India Post's official 10-level grid-based geocoding system). Features 19,000+ pincodes with precise geographic boundaries, 150,000+ post offices, complete administrative hierarchy, seamless PINCODE ↔ DIGIPIN ↔ Coordinates conversion, distance calculator, reverse geocoding, and spatial queries with polygon-accurate location validation.

tags.name: pincodes
tags.description: PINCODE operations - lookup, search, validation, and spatial queries

tags.name: administrative
tags.description: Administrative boundaries - states, districts, and regions

tags.name: digipin
tags.description: DIGIPIN operations - encode, decode, hierarchy, and reverse geocoding

tags.name: distance
tags.description: Distance calculations - point-to-point and batch operations

tags.name: convert
tags.description: Conversion operations - PINCODE ↔ DIGIPIN ↔ H3 ↔ Coordinates

api-key.name: X-API-Key
api-key.description: API key for authentication (recommended). Format: X-API-Key: your_api_key

bearer.description: Alternative: Bearer token authentication. Format: Authorization: Bearer your_api_key

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

coordinates.description: Array of coordinates to encode (1-100 items)

digipinCodes.description: Array of DIGIPIN codes to decode (1-100 items)
